verses.1: Israel is a luxuriant vine that produces his fruit.
verses.3: Surely now they will say, “We have no king; for we don’t fear the LORD;
verses.4: They make promises, swearing falsely in making covenants.
verses.5: The inhabitants of Samaria will be in terror for the calves of Beth Aven,
verses.6: It also will be carried to Assyria for a present to a great king.
verses.7: Samaria and her king float away
verses.8: The high places also of Aven, the sin of Israel, will be destroyed.
verses.9: “Israel, you have sinned from the days of Gibeah.
verses.10: When it is my desire, I will chastise them;
verses.11: Ephraim is a trained heifer that loves to thresh,
verses.14: Therefore a battle roar will arise among your people,
verses.15: So Bethel will do to you because of your great wickedness.
